description.ko: 심우주의 숭고하고 공포스러운 힘을 묘사하며, 빛과 물질이 우주의 공허 속으로 엮여 들어가는 순간을 포착합니다.
description.en: A depiction of the sublime and terrifying power of the deep universe, capturing the moment light and matter are woven into a cosmic void.

prompt: A cinematic 8k render of VOID-3, titled 'The Event Horizon’s Veil.' A massive swirling vortex of #0D0221 obsidian dark matter pulling gossamer-thin #7B68EE lavender nebula tendrils into a central gravitational well. Distant #E6E6FA soft lavender star clusters are distorted by extreme gravitational lensing at the edges of the frame. The core of the singularity emits a faint, haunting #3D1A78 deep purple glow that illuminates the surrounding cosmic dust. Atmosphere of infinite scale and silent majesty, hyper-realistic space photography aesthetic, volumetric lighting, and terrifying cosmic beauty.
